summary: Iteration 55: Tested DTS Delete functionality in Admin Portal. Found and FIXED a critical BUG where the delete confirmation modal was not appearing in the DTS detail view due to renderDeleteModal() being defined after the early return. All backend API tests pass. Toast z-index is properly set to 99999.

backend_delete_wrong_password.test: Admin DELETE with wrong password returns 403

backend_delete_correct_password.test: Admin DELETE with correct password succeeds

frontend_danger_zone_section.notes: Danger Zone card with Delete Request button appears in DTS detail view

frontend_delete_modal.notes: Delete confirmation modal now appears with password input, Cancel, and Delete Permanently buttons
frontend_delete_modal.bug_fixed: Moved renderDeleteModal() definition before early return to ensure it's available in detail view

frontend_toast_zindex.notes: Toaster in App.js has style={{ zIndex: 99999 }} - above Dialog (z-50) and all overlays

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: renderDeleteModal() was defined AFTER the early return for selectedDts view, causing the modal to never render when clicking Delete Request in the detail view
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Moved renderDeleteModal() function definition to BEFORE the loading early return (line 91) so it's available for both detail view and list view
bugs_found_and_fixed.lines_changed: Moved function from ~line 255 to ~line 89, added {renderDeleteModal()} call after Danger Zone card in detail view

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: renderDeleteModal() is now properly defined before it's used in both detail view and list view
GOOD: Toast z-index (99999) is properly configured to appear above modals (z-50)
GOOD: Backend DELETE endpoint properly requires admin_password for admin users with 400/403 error responses
seed_data_creation: Created test DTS task: TEST UI Delete Task (id: 559dd900-7d21-41f3-bf7a-c9a0756afa7c)
context_for_next_testing_agent: DTS Delete functionality fully working. The fix involved moving renderDeleteModal() function definition before the early returns in the DTSTab component. Rate limiting: 10 req/min on auth. Admin login requires OTP - get from db.otps collection.

verification_summary.issue_1_delete_button: VERIFIED - Delete Request button with Danger Zone card appears in DTS detail view
verification_summary.issue_2_error_toast_zindex: VERIFIED - Toaster has zIndex: 99999 in both style prop and toastOptions.style
verification_summary.issue_3_iac_toast_stacking: VERIFIED - Same z-index fix applies to all toasts
